title: Youth Empowerment Takes Center Stage as EMT Foundation Graduates Beneficiaries - FinancialEDGE
description: Photo Caption: .L-R: Chief Mrs Victoria Ekpemupolo with Founder of Esther Matthew Tonlagha Foundation, Mrs. Esther Matthew Tonlagha during the graduation ceremony of the EMT Niger Delta Youth Empowerment programme in Warri, Delta State.
html: Photo Caption: .L-R: Chief Mrs Victoria Ekpemupolo with Founder of Esther Matthew Tonlagha Foundation, Mrs. Esther Matthew Tonlagha during the graduation ceremony of the EMT Niger Delta Youth Empowerment programme in Warri, Delta State.
